info.description: An image next to a block of text. Pick which side the image sits on. Stacks vertically on mobile (image first).

eyebrow.description: Small uppercase label above the heading. Example: 'About Anna', 'The Houseboat', 'Why this matters'. Leave blank to hide.

heading.description: Main heading for this section. Keep under ~8 words.

body.description: Main body copy. Plain text — separate paragraphs with a blank line between them.

image.description: The image to show beside the text. Portrait, landscape, or square — they all work. Recommended at least 1200px wide.

image_caption.description: Tiny italic caption shown under the image (optional). Example: 'Photo by Sarah'. Leave blank to hide.

image_position.description: Which side the image sits on (desktop only — on mobile, image is always above text).

cta_label.description: Optional button under the text. Example: 'Read the full story', 'Join the workshop'. Leave blank to hide button.

cta_url.description: Where the button takes people. Example: /the-work/regulated or https://buy.stripe.com/abc. Leave blank to hide button.

style.description: Optional background colour, text colour, padding, alignment, max width, and background image for this section.
